element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Central navigation point where player obtains artifacts and accesses Timulator
Primary tool for time travel; accessed from museum to select time periods
Required combat prerequisite to obtain each artifact; no damage/death possible
Core gameplay loop: explore 14 selectable historical time periods
Essential for obtaining hints about artifact placement and historical context
Player must deduce correct historical location for artifact based on gathered information
Three random questions covering all visited historical periods; prerequisite for final boss
Final confrontation triggered by correct exam answers; determines ending outcome

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections with no enemies
typical_tension_triggers: Time period exploration requiring enemy avoidance
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate episodic pacing with hub-spoke structure; each artifact cycle (Koopa fight → time travel → exploration → placement) repeats with educational variation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden message blocks scattered throughout time periods providing hint context
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Player must explore non-linear areas in time periods to discover NPC dialogue and message blocks with hints

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction via Koopa minigame and first time period exploration; no damage mechanics prevent frustration
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing exploration complexity as player must identify artifact locations from gathered hints; exploration becomes more open-ended
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalation to final examination (3 random multiple choice questions spanning all visited periods) and boss confrontation with Bowser
notable_spikes: Final examination requiring retention of historical facts across 14 time periods
Bowser boss fight as ultimate challenge with ending variation based on performance

notable_level_patterns.description: Repeating loop: Museum hub → Koopa minigame → Timulator selection → Time period exploration → NPC dialogue → Artifact deduction → Placement → Return to hub
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any of the 14 selectable time periods

notable_level_patterns.description: Each time period is side-scrolling platformer environment populated with NPCs, message blocks, and platforming challenges; player must explore to gather contextual information before artifact placement
Bowser's Museum serves as central hub with radial access to 14 distinct time periods via Timulator; player controls level selection order
Player receives artifact and year; must explore time period to find NPCs and message blocks explaining historical context; deduction required to place artifact correctly

sources_used: wikipedia - Mario's Time Machine gameplay section
